creator: caesar@starkreality.com
text: When trying to build a new kernel based on the 3.0-CURRENT source (updated today via cvsup) the kernel will config, compile, and boot, but when I try to run anything that attempts to use kvm_open, I get a message saying "proc size mismatch: undefined error 0"  I've tried rebuilding libkvm, etc. to no avail.  The only change made in the config file was the removal of the "options PPS_SYNC" option.
